creator: sheldonh@iafrica.com
text:
Hi Jay,

I've tried to reproduce the problem you reported running your sample
program with bash2 and can't for the life of me reproduce the problem.
I've tried with 2.2-STABLE and 4.0-CURRENT, using GNU bash, version
2.02.1(1).

Could you check that you're not perhaps using an older version of bash?
Does the problem persist using 2.2-STABLE (I see you were using
2.2.6-RELEASE when you filed the PR) and the latest bash2?

Thanks,
Sheldon.
